title: Add edge-case unit tests for settlement-math allocate() rounding
summary: Extend the existing money/settlement test coverage with edge cases (zero, single-unit, many-way split) for allocate(). Test-only: no production code changes.

All assertions verify conservation (sum of parts == whole, zero dust)
No production source file is modified
expected_results: new edge-case test exits 0 with all cases passing
deliverables: tests/test-money-allocate-edge.ts with the new edge-case assertions
